mapper.sql: n.note_id, n.author_id, n.question_id, n.content, n.like_count, n.comment_count, n.collect_count, n.created_at, n.updated_at

where.if: AND ( n.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM question q WHERE q.question_id = n.question_id AND q.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.keyword}, '%') ) )

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT n.note_id) FROM note n
INNER JOIN collection_note cn ON cn.note_id = n.note_id

SELECT DISTINCT
FROM note n
INNER JOIN collection_note cn ON cn.note_id = n.note_id
ORDER BY
n.created_at n.created_at
ASC DESC
, n.note_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT
FROM note n WHERE n.author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC, n.note_id DESC

SELECT
FROM note n ORDER BY n.updated_at DESC, n.note_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO note ( author_id, question_id, content, search_vector ) VALUES ( #{authorId}, #{questionId}, #{content}, #{content} )
mapper.update: UPDATE note SET like_count = like_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
UPDATE note SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
UPDATE note SET collect_count = collect_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
UPDATE note SET collect_count = GREATEST(collect_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.avatar_url, ranked.note_count, ranked.rank FROM ( SELECT author_id, COUNT(*) AS note_count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank FROM note GROUP BY author_id ) ranked INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = ranked.author_id ORDER BY ranked.rank ASC, ranked.note_count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM note WHERE author_id = #{authorId} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT author_id, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank_num FROM note WHERE created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY author_id ) this_month WHERE this_month.author_id = #{authorId} AND this_month.rank_num <= 3 ) AS this_month_top3_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT author_id, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rank_num FROM note WHERE created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AND created_at < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY author_id ) last_month WHERE last_month.author_id = #{authorId} AND last_month.rank_num <= 3 ) AS last_month_top3_count
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM note WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT author_id) FROM note WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
mapper.update: UPDATE note SET comment_count = comment_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
UPDATE note SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM note n WHERE n.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY n.created_at DESC, n.note_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT DISTINCT
FROM note n INNER JOIN note_tag nt ON nt.note_id = n.note_id INNER JOIN tag t ON t.tag_id = nt.tag_id WHERE n.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND t.name = #{tag} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC, n.note_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
